task_completion.description: Create a tiddler named 'Director Index' and tag it with 'Index'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the TiddlyWiki interface, a tiddler titled 'Director Index' is visible, and it has a tag pill labeled 'Index'.

task_completion.description: Use dynamic TiddlyWiki syntax to group and list the films, avoiding hardcoded names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler edit mode, the text area contains TiddlyWiki filter and list widgets (e.g., `<$list filter="[tag[Film]!tag[Play]...` or similar) rather than plain text names of directors and films.

task_completion.description: Display unique film directors as Level 2 headings, excluding play directors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rendered tiddler view, there are Level 2 headings (usually larger, bold text) for 'Francis Ford Coppola', 'Martin Scorsese', and 'Quentin Tarantino'. 'Elia Kazan' must NOT appear.

task_completion.description: Display a bulleted list of clickable film links under each director.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under each director's heading in the rendered view, there is a bulleted list where each item is a clickable link (typically blue text) representing a film title.

task_completion.description: Include the release year in parentheses after each film link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rendered bulleted list, immediately following each film link, there is a 4-digit year enclosed in parentheses, e.g., 'The Godfather (1972)'.

task_completion.description: Sort the films under each director chronologically by release year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The years in parentheses for each director's list of films strictly increase from top to bottom (e.g., 1972 before 1974).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki web interface in a browser, with the sidebar, story river, and standard edit/save buttons being used.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler's source code (visible during editing) does not contain the literal strings of the film titles or years typed out manually in a list format.

integrity.description: The output is genuinely rendered by the TiddlyWiki engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The rendered tiddler appears in the standard TiddlyWiki story river with standard formatting, not as a separate text file or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment contains 8 films directed by Francis Ford Coppola, Martin Scorsese, and Quentin Tarantino, and 2 plays directed by Elia Kazan. The rendered 'Director Index' must show Level 2 headings for Coppola, Scorsese, and Tarantino, but NOT Kazan. Under each director, their films must be listed as clickable links followed by release years in parentheses, sorted chronologically. The tiddler must use dynamic TiddlyWiki syntax (e.g., <$list> widgets) and not hardcoded text.
